title: Nila Nila Poguthae Lyrics Aravaan Songs Lyics
stanzas:
Singer: VIjay Prakash, Harini
Song: Nila Nila pogudhu

Music: Karthik
Movie: Aravaan

Nila Nila Nila Nila, Nila Nila Nila Nila
Nila Nila Nila Nila

[Nila Nila Poguthae, nillaamal Poguthae
oolaa oolaa pogudhu, oorvalamaa Poguthae
kaadu mala medu ellaam maranji maranji Poguthae...[ (2)

Inba nila pogudhey, idam marandhu pogudhey
Manalvirandhu pogudhey, mayakki mayakki pogudhey
Vaan nilva naan thazhuva thaen nilavaa maarudhey
Nila Nila Nila Nila
Nila Nila Nila Nila .. (Nila Nila Poguthae..)

Maalai velayil pookum poovaye
Manadhil pokkisathai vaikum velaye
Mouna pootinai thirakkum saaviyai
Kanavai urutti vidum kalla soliye

Manjam vandha madhiye , en uyirin meedhiye
viragathai pootum vizhigalin sadhiye
Siragulla silaye, sitrinba nadhiye

Nila nila moga nila,
Manjal nila pogudhey, moga nila pogudhey
kaadu mala medu ellaam maranji maranji pogudhu...

Moondru jaamamum mayangum velayil
Marugi Marugi nila enna pesudho
Kadhal kannile,vetkam nenjile
Irundhum paarvayile jaadai pesudho

Mangai udal nilaava
Mangai udal nilaavai mounathil thaeya
Pongi varum oliyaai ..
Mulumadhiyo kaaya, moochukulal theeya (Nila Nila Poguthae..)

Inba nila pogudhey, idam marandhu pogudhey
Manalvirandhu pogudhey, mayakki mayakki pogudhey
Vaan nilva naan thazhuva thaen nilavaa maarudhey
[Nila Nila Nila Nila
Nila Nila Nila Nila ] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nila Nila Poguthae'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, evoking a sense of nostalgia and emotional connection.

How does 'Nila Nila Poguthae' fit into the plot of the movie 'Aravaan'?

This song highlights the romantic moments in the film, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationships.

Who are the singers of 'Nila Nila Poguthae'?

The song features the talented voices of Harini and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for 'Nila Nila Poguthae'?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Karthik.

When was 'Nila Nila Poguthae' released?

The song was released on October 10, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nila Nila Poguthae, the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create a romantic atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. The song plays a pivotal role in Aravaan, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters as they navigate love and longing. With its enchanting duet, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The collaboration between Harini and Vijay Prakash, under Karthik's masterful direction, adds a unique charm to this beautiful composition.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nila Nila Poguthae from the movie Aravaan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Harini and Vijay Prakash, paired with Karthik's soulful composition, this song takes listeners on a melodic journey. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with emotions and memories.
stanzaMeanings: The moon is shining, without stopping, everything is moving, the village is moving, the forest and the hills are all fading away...
The joyful moon is shining, the place is forgotten, the sand is moving, everything is enchanting, the sky is where I embrace the honey moon...
The flower that blooms in the evening, brings joy to the heart, the silence opens up the hidden pain, the dream will break the stone-like words...
When the mind comes, it rests on my soul, the eyes that bring detachment, the wings are like a flowing river...
The moon, the beautiful moon, the yellow moon is shining, the beautiful moon is shining, the forest and the hills are all fading away...
In the three moments of time, the moon speaks, in the heart of love, there is a fear, even from a distance, the hair speaks...
The beautiful body is like the moon, the beautiful body is silent, it comes with a shining light... everything is like a flame in the darkness...
The joyful moon is shining, the place is forgotten, the sand is moving, everything is enchanting, the sky is where I embrace the honey moon...
